notes: This file is a fixed competitor baseline for weekly SEO work.
Weekly automation should read this snapshot and must not re-fetch competitor sites.
Refresh only when you explicitly want to rebuild the competitor baseline.

competitors.name: ChipStats
competitors.title: ChipStats – Live Poker Bankroll Tracker App
competitors.metaDescription: Track your poker sessions, bankroll, ROI, and hourly with ChipStats. Built for live players who want speed, insights, and clarity.
h2: Track every live session in seconds. Play smarter. Win more.
positioningNotes: Leans hard into live-session speed and win-rate clarity.
Useful reference for bankroll, ROI, and hourly language on player-facing pages.
sourceNotes: Use for bankroll language, feature framing, and live-session use cases.
Do not mirror branding or feature claims beyond what is publicly visible.

competitors.name: Check Replay
competitors.title: Poker Replayer | Check Replay
competitors.metaDescription: Save time and improve your poker skills with Check Replay. An accessible and intuitive platform for hand history replays.
competitors.h1: Optimize your game with the replayer of choice for poker pros
h2: Your game’s strong — but is your study game on the same level?
How Check Replay Helps Your Game!
Kelvin Kerber is also Check Replay!
positioningNotes: Frames the category directly as a poker replayer.
Good reference for intuitive replay language and skill-improvement positioning.
sourceNotes: Use for replay-page structure, explanatory copy, and review-oriented wording.

competitors.name: HandHistory
competitors.primaryFocus: hand replayer, analysis, and bankroll support
competitors.title: HandHistory - Become a Profitable Poker Player | Track & Analyze Your Game
competitors.metaDescription: Improve your poker game with HandHistory. Track your performance, analyze hands, find leaks with intelligent analysis, and review detailed statistics. Free poker tracking software for PokerStars, GGPoker & more.
h2: View hand replays and stats from any device
positioningNotes: Broad all-in-one tracking and analysis positioning.
Strong source for analysis, statistics, and bankroll vocabulary.
sourceNotes: Use for broad topic coverage and support-page patterns.

competitors.name: EDGE Poker
competitors.title: EDGE Poker | AI Coach, Tracker & Tournament Timer
competitors.metaDescription: The only poker app with AI coaching. GTO trainer, hand logger, study hub, session tracking, tournament timer, and bankroll analytics. Free on the App Store.
positioningNotes: Emphasizes one-app convenience and AI-assisted workflows.
Useful for product-category framing, but not for copying feature breadth.
sourceNotes: Use for positioning comparisons and product-category framing.

competitors.name: Poker Stack
competitors.title: Poker Stack: FREE Poker Bankroll Tracker for iOS & Android
competitors.metaDescription: The easiest bankroll management app for poker. See where your money goes, visualize your progress with over 40+ insightful graphs, become a better player.
competitors.h1: Poker Stack for Poker Money Management
h2: More than a poker bankroll tracker
The best free poker bankroll management app
Bankroll Manager for Texas Hold'em or Omaha?
The Smartest Poker Bankroll Management App
positioningNotes: Very direct bankroll-tracker wording with cross-platform app language.
Good reference for simple bankroll-management and graph/reporting phrasing.
sourceNotes: Use for bankroll intent language and session-tracking comparisons.
